en.extract:
The yellow-legged weaver (Ploceus flavipes) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is endemic to Democratic Republic of the Congo.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

The '''yellow-legged weaver''' ('''''Ploceus flavipes''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Democratic Republic of the Congo]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
